name: KELAI
long_description:
For decades, finance has been a race to know first. The first traders belonged to the floor; then came quant teams building infrastructure to interpret markets systematically.
In the era of AI, as the boundary between human and machine intelligence dissolves, KelAI brings finance into cognitive interpretation at scale. Our autonomous agents read every market move, formulate systematic investment insights and compound knowledge at market speed.

Compounding intelligence, trade by trade.
one_liner: Intelligence platform for systematic market insights
